programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: (M) Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess crashes on shore and is taken in by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she recovers, she realizes she's wandered out of one trap into another.

programme.title: A Lifeguard'S Obsession
programme.desc: (M) When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life...and her heart.

programme.title: Christmas In Alaska
programme.desc: (PG) Two rival journalists competing for the same promotion get stranded in snowy Alaska after an emergency landing. They find themselves caught up in an unexpected Christmas romance.

programme.title: Wendy Williams: The Movie
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
